title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: How to draw half your deck for one mana.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a monored combo deck, featuring Zada, Hedron Grinder as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro
01:00 - Deck Tech
07:31 - vs Bonny Pall, Clearcutter
16:50 - vs Zimone and Dina
22:35 - vs Emperor Apatzec Intli IV
27:33 - vs Derevi, Empyrial Tactician
33:24 - vs Eladamri, Korvecdal
42:57 - vs Liliana of the Dark Realms
46:51 - vs Bristly Bill, Spine Sower
52:30 - vs Florian, Voldaren Scion

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/zada-hedron-grinder-brawl
